# protonpass_vault_member (Resource)

Manages a member's access to a Proton Pass Vault.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "protonpass_vault_member" "example" {
  share_id = protonpass_vault.example.share_id
  email    = "someone@example.com"
  role     = "viewer"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) The email address of the user to invite.
- `role` (String) The role of the user within the vault. Allowed values: `viewer`, `editor`, `manager`.
- `share_id` (String) The Share ID of the vault.

### Read-Only

- `member_share_id` (String) The unique identifier for this member's access to the vault.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Vault Members can be imported by specifying the Vault Share ID and Member Share ID separated by a colon
terraform import protonpass_vault_member.example "share_id:member_share_id"
```
